title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama GitHub repo with the CLI tool that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any model served by the local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and embedders for chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama (ChatGPT-style UI) with multi-model chats, markdown, code highlighting.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Lightweight CLI copilot that uses Ollama models to suggest shell commands and explain stderr messages.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template: loads PDFs → chunk → Ollama embeddings → vector DB → chat with Llama-3.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers prompts using any Ollama model with slash commands and per-guild configs.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for the Ollama REST API providing ergonomic procedures for chat and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK for Ollama with .NET 6+ support and both sync/async APIs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module that spins up Ollama as a service container for integration tests of LLM-based features.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or slash-command with thread support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed APIs and async client for the Ollama HTTP endpoints using reqwest.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper that exposes Ollama as a GenServer for fault-tolerant LLM calls in Phoenix apps.

title: ollama-kotlin
summary: Kotlin multiplatform SDK for JVM/Android targeting Ollama with coroutines and Ktor client.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated registry of Modelfile recipes for community-tuned Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, and vision variants.

title: ollama-rag-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that creates a local RAG vault backed by Ollama embeddings for semantic note search.

title: ollama-huggingface-space
summary: Hugging Face Space demo that streams Llama-3-8b via Ollama running inside a Docker Space container.
